mnemonics.title: Radiometry vs Photometry
mnemonics.content: Radiometry - Real physical measurements; Photometry - Perceived by human eye

mnemonics.title: Reflection Types
mnemonics.content: Lambertian - Like matte surfaces (L for Lots of directions); Specular - Shiny surfaces (S for Specific direction)

mnemonics.title: Image Formation Steps
mnemonics.content: Light → Lens → Aperture → Sensor → ADC → Processor → Image (LLASAPI)
